title: Guest Experience & Revenue Analytics
description: Monitor RevPAR, occupancy rates, guest satisfaction scores, and loyalty programme performance across properties.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: 50,000 hotel bookings with channel, room type, rate, and status
5,000 guest profiles with loyalty tier, region, and stay history
50 hotel properties with star rating, city, and room count
20,000 guest reviews with category scores and sentiment

fabricItems.name: hospitality_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all hospitality analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean, validate, and derive ADR, RevPAR inputs, and satisfaction scores

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: daily revenue, occupancy, loyalty segments, channel performance, weekly trends, property scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, revenue heatmap, loyalty analysis, property performance

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, revenue trends, and property comparison

fabricItems.name: hospitality_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with revenue, occupancy, and guest satisfaction measures

fabricItems.name: Guest Experience Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Revenue & Occupancy, Guest Satisfaction, Loyalty Performance

fabricItems.name: daily_hospitality_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
